# hot-vs-nice

hot-vs-nice is a free open-source SVG color exploration tool by Ali Güzel / YCSWU.

- Type: hybrid desktop and static web application
- Main purpose: inspect SVG colors, preview alternative palettes, and export revised SVG artwork
- Inputs: SVG files, text overlay input
- Outputs: SVG export, Windows desktop builds, static web build
- Repository: https://github.com/aliguzel996/hot-vs-nice
- Releases: https://github.com/aliguzel996/hot-vs-nice/releases/latest

It is not a raster editor and does not guarantee exact Pantone certification.
